title: SQK-MAP006 Low Input protocol for library preparation for Nanopore sequencing
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"95jql","text":"Describes the library preparation for Nanopore sequencing from low input DNA according to the SQK-MAP006 protocol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9tpb6","text":"It accompanies the GigaScience publication:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":19,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"jj0g","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1e4nt","text":"Benjamin Istace, et al. (2017) De novo assembly and population genomic survey of natural yeast isolates with the Oxford Nanopore MinION sequencer. GigaScience...","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":147,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Fragment DNA (500ng) to a 8Kb size using Covaris gTube
Perform FFPE treatment (NEBNext® FFPE DNA Repair Mix) of fragmented DNA
The DNA repair reaction was cleaned up with Agencourt AMPure XP beads (1x)
100 ng DNA fragments are End-repaired using NEBNext® Ultra™ II End Repair Module
DNA fragments were dA-tailed by using the NEBNext® dA-Tailing Module
The End-Prep reaction was cleaned up with AMPure beads (1x)
Nanopore adaptors were ligated to the dA-tailed DNA fragment by using NEB Blunt/TA Ligase Master Mix
The ligation reaction was cleaned up with MyOne C1-beads (1x)
creator: Gigascience Database
